raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table; a gentle lateral brace will not shift the stacked boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally braced by the left end-effector to prevent movement while box_1 is being detached/lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors have clear access to opposite side faces of box_1; box_2 is stabilized; enough vertical clearance exists above box_1 to lift without contacting the table or box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors from the sides, with load shared; attachment/friction to box_2 is controlled."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already held; box_2 remains stabilized; there is unobstructed space above box_1 to lift straight up to break the attachment/contact without scraping.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is separated from box_2 and lifted upward, no longer on_top_of/attached_to box_2, remaining securely supported in the robot's hands."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table; a gentle lateral brace will not shift the stacked boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally braced by the left end-effector to prevent movement while box_1 is being detached/lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors have clear access to opposite side faces of box_1; box_2 is stabilized; enough vertical clearance exists above box_1 to lift without contacting the table or box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors from the sides, with load shared; attachment/friction to box_2 is controlled.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already held; box_2 remains stabilized; there is unobstructed space above box_1 to lift straight up to break the attachment/contact without scraping.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is separated from box_2 and lifted upward, no longer on_top_of/attached_to box_2, remaining securely supported in the robot's hands.
